headline: Marcus Rashford — update
body: 🚨 Marcus Rashford £40m release clause is not valid for Man City and Liverpool — the final decision stands with the player. He’s gonna assess all options, Man United too; including staying under Michael Carrick. 🎥➕ https://t.co/skhWvoFsS3 ht
text:
🚨 Marcus Rashford £40m release clause is not valid for Man City and Liverpool — the final decision stands with the player.

He’s gonna assess all options, Man United too; including staying under Michael Carrick.

🎥➕ https://t.co/skhWvoFsS3 https://t.co/6dOWROzQMl
